nasb.text: Not one of the good promises which the Lord had made to the house of Israel failed; all came to pass.

esv.text: Not one word of all the good promises that the Lord had made to the house of Israel had failed; all came to pass.

cnv.text: 耶和華向以色列家應許賜福的話，沒有一句落空，都應驗了。

ccb.text: 耶和华给以色列人的美好应许没有一句落空，全部实现了。
